name: Grape Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the grape juice into a large saucepan.
2. Add sugar to the saucepan and stir until fully dissolved.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat to medium and add the Certo, stirring continuously.
5. Continue boiling for an additional 30 seconds, then remove from heat.
6. Allow the jelly to cool before transferring it to clean bottles.
